cit.basis: Imposto Industrial (Industrial Tax) at 25% standard rate under Law 26/20 (Industrial Tax Code, as amended).
cit.note: Banking, insurance and telecommunications are taxed at 35%; agriculture, forestry and livestock at 10%. Oil sector operations fall under a separate petroleum income tax regime (Imposto sobre o Rendimento do Petróleo) — out of scope for this SME estimator. Administered by the Administração Geral Tributária (AGT).

vat.note: IVA at 14% standard rate; reduced/simplified bands (e.g. 7% under the simplified regime and for certain essential goods) apply to qualifying taxpayers and supplies.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Petroleum income tax, mining regimes, withholding taxes, incentives, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official AGT guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
